title: coreopsis delphiniifolia var. rigida
intro: Coreopsis delphiniifolia var. rigida, also known as stiff coreopsis or stiff tickseed, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae), characterized by its unique, stiff branches and bright yellow flowers with a distinctive shape. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coreopsis delphiniifolia var. rigida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
